input.context: v2 correction: re-ground the Humanly ExO assessment on the full three-entity Hold Co. structure (capital arm Communities + platform arm Labs) using building-an-exo v1.3.0 and the Bloch moat lens.

output.summary: v2 Humanly ExO 3.0 assessment re-grounded on Hold Co. + Communities + Labs. Labs (HumanlyOS+Placecraft+Data) is a live Intelligence Stack compounding across owned SPVs and external customers. DRIVE raw ~17 GOVERN-capped 13 (cap now binds), SHAPE ~17 (Adaptive 5/5), Miura-Ko L2->L3, Readiness ~42/80. Data moat = also the external-trust liability -> v20 no-fork data governance + HIDO + Cross-Org Accountability now central; Labs = Edge Twin already incorporated. Asset-heavy(atoms)+asset-light(bits) by design (GSE 8% cap forces the boundary). Roadmap reordered: govern the Stack first.

input.context: Write the final standalone June 2026 ExO 3.0 report on Humanly Hold Co. from current state; current state + trajectory, no comparison to prior reports.

output.summary: Final report humanly-as-exo-3-0-June-2026 (MD+HTML). Standalone current-state ExO 3.0 assessment of Humanly Hold Co.: live platform (Labs) + asset-heavy capital arm (Communities); DRIVE raw ~17 capped 13, SHAPE ~17, Miura-Ko L2->L3, Readiness ~42/80; missing control plane is the binding constraint and the external-business unlock; govern-first roadmap.
